description: Define and seed the practice item and objective blueprint model — mapping stable practice problem families to objectives, objective policies, and metadata needed for SRS card creation and queue prioritization.
deviation_notes: All 6 phases complete. Phase 6 (Verification and Handoff): tests 2667 passing/6 known failures (equivalence validator), lint passing, build passing. Problem families seeded for all 9 modules (module-1 through module-9). Practice items auto-generated via seedPracticeItems. Objective policies assigned for 32 competency standards. validateBlueprint mutation available for referential integrity checks.
